text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 161 

SR_SCRNG_DT 

LABEL: Screening Date 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Screening date. 

LONG NAME: SR_SCRNG_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: Format: DDMONYYYY (e.g., 26NOV2018) 

COMMENT: Screening dates occurred between May 1, 2018–January 31, 2023. 

Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
